report_name: OneDigital Discloses Supply-Chain Breach from 2025, 28,000 Individuals Impacted

threat_actors.name: Unattributed Actor
threat_actors.description: The unknown threat actor responsible for the supply-chain attack against OneDigital Investment Advisors by exploiting a vulnerability in the Drift chat application in August 2025.
threat_actors.goals: Data theft of sensitive personal information, including names and Social Security numbers, from a financial advisory firm's client database.

attack_patterns.name: Compromise Software Supply Chain
attack_patterns.description: The attackers exploited a vulnerability in the third-party Drift chat application, which was integrated into OneDigital's CRM stack, to gain access to their environment.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: An unspecified vulnerability in the web-facing components of the Drift chat application or its integration APIs was exploited for initial access.

attack_patterns.name: Data from Information Repositories
attack_patterns.description: The threat actor accessed and copied client data, including names and Social Security numbers, from the Salesforce CRM environment.

attack_patterns.name: Cloud Accounts
attack_patterns.description: The exploit may have granted the attacker access via the service account or API keys used to connect the Drift application to the Salesforce CRM platform.

vulnerabilities.name: Vulnerability in Drift Chat Application
vulnerabilities.description: An unspecified vulnerability in the Drift online chat application was exploited, allowing unauthorized actors to access and copy client data stored within OneDigital's Salesforce environment.

identities.name: OneDigital Investment Advisors
identities.description: A financial advisory firm that was the victim of a supply-chain data breach, resulting in the exposure of 28,414 clients' personal information.

identities.name: Salesforce
identities.description: OneDigital's current CRM provider, whose platform stored the compromised data and who initially detected and notified OneDigital of the suspicious activity.

identities.name: Salesloft
identities.description: OneDigital's former CRM platform, which had the vulnerable Drift chat application integrated into it.

identities.name: Drift
identities.description: Provider of the online chat application that contained the vulnerability exploited in the supply-chain attack.

identities.name: Clients of OneDigital Investment Advisors
identities.description: A group of 28,414 individuals whose sensitive personal information, including names and Social Security numbers, was compromised in the data breach.

indicators.name: Anomalous Salesforce SOQL Query for PII
indicators.pattern:
title: Anomalous Salesforce SOQL Query for PII
id: 2b1a9c8d-f3e4-4b5a-8c7d-6e9f0a1b2c3d
status: experimental
description: 'Detects a Salesforce Object Query Language (SOQL) query that attempts to select Social Security Numbers, which could indicate data exfiltration from a CRM. This was the method used to steal data in the OneDigital breach.'
references:
  - https://www.plansponsor.com/onedigital-latest-to-warn-clients-of-salesforce-data-breach/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-04-14
tags:
  - attack.t1213
  - attack.collection
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate applications that require access to SSNs for business purposes.
level: medium
logsource:
  category: application
detection:
  selection:
    query|contains|all:
      - 'SELECT'
      - 'FROM Contact'
      - 'Social_Security_Number__c'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects Salesforce API queries for sensitive data like Social Security Numbers, which was the method of exfiltration in this breach.

relationships.source_name: Anomalous Salesforce SOQL Query for PII
